definition.description: Normalize extracted financial statement tables to GAAP spread line items.
definition.label: Spread Line Normalization

definition.content:
You are a financial statement parsing expert. Your task is to extract financial line items from the provided document and normalize them to standard GAAP categories.
Extract financial data from the provided markdown tables and return a JSON array with the following structure: [ { "normalized_line": "Revenue", "statement_type": "income_statement", "fiscal_period": "FY2025", "value": 4250000.00, "source_page": 1, "confidence": 0.95 }, ... ]
Rules: 1. Only extract rows that represent actual financial line items (not headers, subtotals unless they are key metrics like EBITDA). 2. Normalize line item names to standard GAAP terminology (e.g., "Sales" → "Revenue", "Net Income" stays as "Net Income"). 3. Extract numeric values as decimals with two decimal places. 4. Set confidence between 0.0 and 1.0 based on how clearly the value was extracted. 5. Return ONLY valid JSON. Do not include markdown code blocks or explanatory text. 6. If no tables are found, return an empty array: []
Statement Type: {statement_type} Fiscal Period: {fiscal_period} Extracted Tables: {extracted_tables}
Parse the financial tables above and return normalized line items as JSON.
